title: Oracle’s selloff offers a chance to buy an ‘upper-echelon’ growth stock for cheap, analyst says
author: William Gavin
fullText: An Oppenheimer analyst has turned bullish on Oracle’s stock after a selloff that has wiped away more than half the company’s value since its September peak.
summary: An Oppenheimer analyst has turned bullish on Oracle’s stock after a selloff that has wiped away more than half the company’s value since its September peak.
